changes.description: Added explicit BEGIN/ROLLBACK read transaction around all_issues/all_dependencies/all_labels/all_events in export_jsonl() for consistent WAL snapshot
Changed silent 'except Exception:' to 'except Exception as exc:' with stderr logging in pre_bash() — surfaces debugging info without blocking commands
Added _ALLOWED_TABLES frozenset and validation check in _column_exists() to prevent PRAGMA SQL injection from untrusted table names
